steps.title: Connect zeros to the graph
steps.content: The equation $f(x)=0$ asks for the $x$-values where the graph crosses the $x$-axis. In other words, it asks for the number of $x$-intercepts.

steps.title: Count the x-intercepts
steps.content: From the shown graph, the exponential curve approaches a horizontal level and does not intersect the $x$-axis. Therefore there are no values of $x$ for which $f(x)=0$.

steps.title: Match the count
steps.content: The count is zero, so the matching choice is the one labeled zero. The answer is D.
